stage: Authoritative availability integration with INTEGRATION-only backend actions
notes: Build dates must be carried forward on every materially changed MAXIM portal version so screenshots and feedback can be tied to the exact build under review. The MAXIM course/date selector now reads docs/data/schedule_future.json and filters by the same public open/direct-booking rules used by the public scheduler. Persistent registrations, persistent /go/ links, Skip, and View history remain INTEGRATION-only and are not live.
